maml:description.maml:para: Adds text to a Visual Studio Code text document.
Adds text to a Visual Studio Code text document at the specified position. Use this command when automating editor changes from PowerShell running inside the PowerShell Pro Tools host.
The position where text is inserted.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The text to insert or send.
The text document to read or update.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The position where text is inserted.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The text to insert or send.
The text document to read or update.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell $document = Get-VSCodeTextDocument $position = New-VSCodePosition -Line 0 -Character 0 Add-VSCodeTextDocumentText -TextDocument $document -Position $position -Text '# Header' ``` Adds text to the beginning of the active document.

maml:description.maml:para: Clears a text editor decoration in Visual Studio Code.
Clears a decoration that was previously created with Set-VSCodeTextEditorDecoration. The key identifies which decoration registration to remove.
The unique key used to identify a decoration.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The unique key used to identify a decoration.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Clear-VSCodeDecoration -Key 'search-highlight' ``` Clears the decoration identified by the key.

maml:description.maml:para: Returns completion items for PowerShell code.
Returns completion items for a command, variable, type, or file path based on the supplied PowerShell context. The command is used by RapidSense and editor completion features.
Assembly names to exclude from completion results.
Type names to exclude from completion results.
Type names to include in completion context.
The command text to complete.
Command names to exclude from completion results.
Module names to exclude from completion results.
Variable names to exclude from completion results.
The variable name to complete.
The file path used as completion context.
The working directory used when resolving completions.
The command text to complete.
The working directory used when resolving completions.
The file path used as completion context.
Assembly names to exclude from completion results.
Command names to exclude from completion results.
Module names to exclude from completion results.
Type names to exclude from completion results.
Variable names to exclude from completion results.
Type names to include in completion context.
The variable name to complete.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Get-CompletionItem -Command 'Get-Pro' ``` Returns completion items for a partially typed command.

maml:description.maml:para: Gets a variable stored by the PowerShell Pro Tools host.
Retrieves a variable value stored by the PowerShell Pro Tools host. Use ValueOnly to return only the value rather than the host variable wrapper.
The path to the input file or host variable.
Returns only the stored variable value.
The path to the input file or host variable.
Returns only the stored variable value.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Get-PoshToolsVariable -Path 'Session.Result' -ValueOnly ``` Returns only the value stored at the specified host variable path.

maml:description.maml:para: Gets the active Visual Studio Code terminal.
Returns the active Visual Studio Code terminal object so it can be used with commands such as Send-VSCodeTerminalText.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell $terminal = Get-VSCodeTerminal ``` Gets the active terminal.

maml:description.maml:para: Gets the active Visual Studio Code text document.
Returns the active Visual Studio Code text document object for use with commands that read or update editor text.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell $document = Get-VSCodeTextDocument ``` Gets the active text document.

maml:description.maml:para: Gets text from a Visual Studio Code text document.
Gets text from a Visual Studio Code text document. Provide a range to retrieve only part of the document.
The range of text to read, remove, or decorate.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The text document to read or update.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The range of text to read, remove, or decorate.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The text document to read or update.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell $document = Get-VSCodeTextDocument Get-VSCodeTextDocumentText -TextDocument $document ``` Returns all text from the active document.

maml:description.maml:para: Gets the active Visual Studio Code text editor.
Returns the active Visual Studio Code text editor object for use with decoration and editor automation commands.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell $editor = Get-VSCodeTextEditor ``` Gets the active text editor.

maml:description.maml:para: Measures execution timing for an instrumented script block.
Measures timing information for a section of PowerShell code. It can target a script block or a named command or pipeline segment in a script file.
The ending offset of the measured block.
The file name to open or use as context.
The script block to profile or measure.
The starting offset of the measured block.
The command name to measure within the script.
The module name to measure within the script.
The pipeline method to measure.
The script block to profile or measure.
The command name to measure within the script.
The ending offset of the measured block.
The file name to open or use as context.
The module name to measure within the script.
The pipeline method to measure.
The script block to profile or measure.
The starting offset of the measured block.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Measure-Block -ScriptBlock { Get-ChildItem } ``` Measures the supplied script block.

maml:description.maml:para: Measures execution timing for a script file or script block.
Runs a PowerShell script file or script block under the PowerShell Pro Tools profiler and returns timing information for the profiled script.
The script block to profile or measure.
The path to the PowerShell script file.
The path to the PowerShell script file.
The script block to profile or measure.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Measure-Script -FilePath .\Build.ps1 ``` Profiles a PowerShell script file.

maml:description.maml:para: Creates attachment styling for a Visual Studio Code decoration.
Creates before or after attachment styling that can be assigned to a Visual Studio Code text editor decoration.
The CSS background color to apply.
The CSS border value to apply.
The CSS border color to apply.
The CSS foreground color to apply.
The text displayed by a decoration attachment.
The CSS font style to apply.
The CSS font weight to apply.
The CSS height for the decoration attachment.
The CSS margin for the decoration attachment.
The CSS text-decoration value to apply.
The CSS width for the decoration attachment.
The CSS background color to apply.
The CSS border value to apply.
The CSS border color to apply.
The CSS foreground color to apply.
The text displayed by a decoration attachment.
The CSS font style to apply.
The CSS font weight to apply.
The CSS height for the decoration attachment.
The CSS margin for the decoration attachment.
The CSS text-decoration value to apply.
The CSS width for the decoration attachment.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell $after = New-VSCodeDecorationAttachment -ContentText ' <- review' -Color '#888888' ``` Creates attachment styling for text displayed after a decorated range.

maml:description.maml:para: Creates a Visual Studio Code position.
Creates a Visual Studio Code position object from zero-based line and character values.
The zero-based character offset within the line.
The zero-based line number.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The zero-based character offset within the line.
The zero-based line number.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell New-VSCodePosition -Line 10 -Character 4 ``` Creates a position at line 10, character 4.

maml:description.maml:para: Creates a Visual Studio Code range.
Creates a Visual Studio Code range object from zero-based start and end line and character values.
The zero-based ending character offset.
The zero-based ending line number.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The zero-based starting character offset.
The zero-based starting line number.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The zero-based ending character offset.
The zero-based ending line number.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The zero-based starting character offset.
The zero-based starting line number.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell New-VSCodeRange -StartLine 0 -StartCharacter 0 -EndLine 0 -EndCharacter 10 ``` Creates a range covering the first ten characters in the document.

maml:description.maml:para: Creates an item for a Visual Studio Code tree view.
Creates a tree item object for a Visual Studio Code tree view registered with Register-VSCodeTreeView.
Additional descriptive text for the item or tree view.
Prevents the tree item from invoking an action when selected.
Indicates that the tree item can load child items.
The icon associated with the tree item or tree view.
The display label.
Tooltip text shown for the item.
Additional descriptive text for the item or tree view.
Prevents the tree item from invoking an action when selected.
Indicates that the tree item can load child items.
The icon associated with the tree item or tree view.
The display label.
Tooltip text shown for the item.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell New-VSCodeTreeItem -Label 'Build' -Description 'Run build task' -Tooltip 'Start the build' ``` Creates a tree item for a custom view.

maml:description.maml:para: Opens a text document in Visual Studio Code.
Opens a file in Visual Studio Code and returns the corresponding text document object.
The file name to open or use as context.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The file name to open or use as context.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Open-VSCodeTextDocument -FileName .\README.md ``` Opens README.md in Visual Studio Code.

maml:description.maml:para: Stores pipeline input in the PowerShell Pro Tools host.
Stores pipeline input in the PowerShell Pro Tools host so it can be inspected or retrieved later. Use PassThru to continue passing objects through the pipeline.
Excludes automatic PowerShell variables from the stored value set.
The object to display, expand, or store.
Returns selected or original objects to the pipeline.
Excludes automatic PowerShell variables from the stored value set.
The object to display, expand, or store.
Returns selected or original objects to the pipeline.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Get-Process | Out-PoshToolsVariable -PassThru ``` Stores the processes in the host and continues passing them through the pipeline.

maml:description.maml:para: Shows objects in a Visual Studio Code grid view.
Displays pipeline objects in a Visual Studio Code grid view. It can be used for display only or to return selected rows.
The object to display, expand, or store.
Returns selected or original objects to the pipeline.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The grid view title.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The object to display, expand, or store.
Controls how grid view selections are returned.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The grid view title.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The object to display, expand, or store.
Controls how grid view selections are returned.
Returns selected or original objects to the pipeline.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The grid view title.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Get-Process | Out-VSCodeGridView -Title 'Processes' -PassThru ``` Displays processes in a grid view and returns selected rows.

maml:description.maml:para: Registers a Visual Studio Code tree view.
Registers a custom Visual Studio Code tree view backed by PowerShell script blocks for loading children and invoking items.
Additional descriptive text for the item or tree view.
The icon associated with the tree item or tree view.
The script block invoked when a child item is selected.
The display label.
The script block used to load child tree items.
Tooltip text shown for the item.
Additional descriptive text for the item or tree view.
The icon associated with the tree item or tree view.
The script block invoked when a child item is selected.
The display label.
The script block used to load child tree items.
Tooltip text shown for the item.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Register-VSCodeTreeView -Label 'Scripts' -LoadChildren { Get-ChildItem . -Filter *.ps1 | ForEach-Object { New-VSCodeTreeItem -Label $_.Name } } ``` Registers a tree view whose children are generated by a script block.

maml:description.maml:para: Removes text from a Visual Studio Code text document.
Removes text from a Visual Studio Code text document over the specified range.
The range of text to read, remove, or decorate.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The text document to read or update.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The range of text to read, remove, or decorate.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The text document to read or update.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell $document = Get-VSCodeTextDocument $range = New-VSCodeRange -StartLine 0 -StartCharacter 0 -EndLine 0 -EndCharacter 5 Remove-VSCodeTextDocumentText -TextDocument $document -Range $range ``` Removes text from the supplied document range.

maml:description.maml:para: Removes a Visual Studio Code text editor reference.
Removes or disposes a text editor reference managed by the PowerShell Pro Tools VS Code host.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The text editor to decorate or remove.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The text editor to decorate or remove.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell $editor = Get-VSCodeTextEditor Remove-VSCodeTextEditor -TextEditor $editor ``` Removes the active text editor reference.

maml:description.maml:para: Sends text to a Visual Studio Code terminal.
Sends text to a Visual Studio Code terminal. You can target a terminal by object or name and control whether a newline is appended.
Appends a newline after the text is sent to the terminal.
The terminal name.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The text to insert or send.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
Appends a newline after the text is sent to the terminal.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The terminal object to receive text.
The text to insert or send.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
Appends a newline after the text is sent to the terminal.
The terminal name.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The terminal object to receive text.
The text to insert or send.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Send-VSCodeTerminalText -Name 'PowerShell' -Text 'Get-Process' -AddNewLine ``` Sends a command to the named terminal and appends a newline.

maml:description.maml:para: Sets the Visual Studio Code status bar message.
Displays a message in the Visual Studio Code status bar. Use Timeout to automatically hide the message after a period of time.
The message text to display.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The number of milliseconds to show the status bar message.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The message text to display.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The number of milliseconds to show the status bar message.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Set-VSCodeStatusBarMessage -Message 'Build complete' -Timeout 5000 ``` Shows a status bar message for five seconds.

maml:description.maml:para: Sets a Visual Studio Code text editor decoration.
Creates or updates text editor decoration styling in Visual Studio Code and applies it to one or more ranges in a text editor.
Attachment styling to display after the decorated text.
The CSS background color to apply.
Attachment styling to display before the decorated text.
The CSS border value to apply.
The CSS border color to apply.
The CSS border radius to apply.
The CSS border style to apply.
The CSS border width to apply.
The CSS foreground color to apply.
The CSS cursor value to use over the decorated text.
The CSS font style to apply.
The CSS font weight to apply.
Applies the decoration to the whole line.
The unique key used to identify a decoration.
The CSS letter spacing to apply.
The CSS opacity value to apply.
The CSS outline value to apply.
The CSS outline color to apply.
The CSS outline style to apply.
The CSS outline width to apply.
The range of text to read, remove, or decorate.
Controls how the decoration range behaves as text changes.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The CSS text-decoration value to apply.
The text editor to decorate or remove.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
Attachment styling to display after the decorated text.
The CSS background color to apply.
Attachment styling to display before the decorated text.
The CSS border value to apply.
The CSS border color to apply.
The CSS border radius to apply.
The CSS border style to apply.
The CSS border width to apply.
The CSS foreground color to apply.
The CSS cursor value to use over the decorated text.
The CSS font style to apply.
The CSS font weight to apply.
Applies the decoration to the whole line.
The unique key used to identify a decoration.
The CSS letter spacing to apply.
The CSS opacity value to apply.
The CSS outline value to apply.
The CSS outline color to apply.
The CSS outline style to apply.
The CSS outline width to apply.
The range of text to read, remove, or decorate.
Controls how the decoration range behaves as text changes.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The CSS text-decoration value to apply.
The text editor to decorate or remove.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell $editor = Get-VSCodeTextEditor $range = New-VSCodeRange -StartLine 0 -StartCharacter 0 -EndLine 0 -EndCharacter 5 Set-VSCodeTextEditorDecoration -TextEditor $editor -Key 'highlight' -Range $range -BackgroundColor '#ffff0033' ``` Highlights a range in the active editor.

maml:description.maml:para: Shows an input box in Visual Studio Code.
Shows a Visual Studio Code input box and returns the value entered by the user.
The ending character index for the selected input text.
Keeps the picker or input box open when focus moves away.
Masks the input box value.
Placeholder text shown before input or selection.
Prompt text shown in the input box.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The starting character index for the selected input text.
The default value shown in the input box.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The ending character index for the selected input text.
Keeps the picker or input box open when focus moves away.
Masks the input box value.
Placeholder text shown before input or selection.
Prompt text shown in the input box.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The starting character index for the selected input text.
The default value shown in the input box.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Show-VSCodeInputBox -Prompt 'Enter a server name' -PlaceHolder 'localhost' ``` Prompts the user for a server name.

maml:description.maml:para: Shows a message in Visual Studio Code.
Shows an information, warning, or error message in Visual Studio Code. Optional items are displayed as action buttons.
The items to show as actions or selections.
The message text to display.
Shows the message as a modal dialog.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The message type. Use Information, Warning, or Error.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
The items to show as actions or selections.
The message text to display.
Shows the message as a modal dialog.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
The message type. Use Information, Warning, or Error.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Show-VSCodeMessage -Message 'Build complete' -Type Information ``` Shows an informational message in Visual Studio Code.

maml:description.maml:para: Shows a quick pick list in Visual Studio Code.
Shows a Visual Studio Code quick pick list and returns the selected item or items.
Allows the user to select more than one item.
Keeps the picker or input box open when focus moves away.
The items to show as actions or selections.
Placeholder text shown before input or selection.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
Allows the user to select more than one item.
Keeps the picker or input box open when focus moves away.
The items to show as actions or selections.
Placeholder text shown before input or selection.
The number of milliseconds to wait for a response from Visual Studio Code.
Waits for the VS Code command response before returning.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Show-VSCodeQuickPick -Items 'Debug','Release' -PlaceHolder 'Select configuration' ``` Prompts the user to select a build configuration.

maml:description.maml:para: Starts the PowerShell Pro Tools VS Code host server.
Starts the named-pipe server used by the PowerShell Pro Tools VS Code extension to communicate with PowerShell commands.
The named pipe used by the host server.
The named pipe used by the host server.
This command returns objects described by the section heading.

maml:alert.maml:para: This command is intended for use with PowerShell Pro Tools automation.

maml:introduction.maml:para: ```powershell Start-PoshToolsServer -PipeName 'PowerShellProTools' ``` Starts the VS Code host server using the specified named pipe.
